introduction: In this presentation, we will explore the growth of our customer service team in 2024 and its impact on our service delivery. We will specifically focus on the hiring decisions made by Rachel, our Head of Customer Service.

subsections.heading: Overview of Customer Service Team Expansion
subsections.content:
• Customer service team started with 20 members in 2016
• Expanded to 30 members by the end of 2019 due to increased customer demands
• Hired a new team leader in 2020 to manage the growing team
• Implemented a new CRM system in 2021 to handle the increased workload
• Added a second shift to accommodate different time zones in 2022
• Conducted a company-wide service training in 2023 to enhance service quality
• Initiated a performance-based incentive program in 2023 to boost team morale
subsections.justification: This slide provides a historical overview of team expansion, but does not reveal the specific hiring done by Rachel in 2024.

subsections.heading: Impact of New Hires on Service Quality
subsections.content:
• Observed a 15% decrease in customer complaints in Q2 2024
• Average call wait time reduced from 10 minutes to 7 minutes in 2024
• Customer satisfaction score increased from 80% to 85% in 2024
• First-call resolution rate improved by 5% in 2024
• Employee satisfaction rate rose to 90% in 2024, indicating a positive work environment
• Service level agreement adherence improved by 10% in 2024
• Initiated a bi-annual performance review process in 2024 to track progress
• Customer retention rate climbed by 7% in 2024, reflecting improved service
subsections.justification: While this slide discusses the impact of new hires, it does not specify how many were hired by Rachel in 2024.

subsections.heading: Detailed View of Rachel's Hiring Decisions in 2024
subsections.content:
• Rachel employed a structured interview process for hiring
• She focused on candidates with strong communication and problem-solving abilities
• Rachel included a two-stage interview process with a practical assignment
• She collaborated with HR to ensure a smooth onboarding process for new hires
• Rachel instituted a mentorship program for new hires in the team
• She encouraged diversity in hiring to bring in varied perspectives
• Rachel prioritized hiring candidates with a customer-centric mindset
subsections.justification: This slide focuses on Rachel's hiring process and criteria but does not mention the number of customer service representatives she hired in 2024.

conclusion: The strategic hiring decisions made by Rachel in 2024 have significantly boosted our customer service capabilities. Moving forward, we need to continuously invest in our customer service team to maintain our service quality and customer satisfaction.
